plugins.name: aidd-overlay
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework: dig, harvest, reconcile-normative, data-optimize, web-optimize, seo-optimize, status. Alias: rechallenge, endtask, bump-plugin, previously, smarten, skillconf, aiddlegacy, weeklyemail, gitit.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design system funnel — 5 verbs: define · destructure · adjust (freeze 3-layer contract) · enforce (portable linter + sc-* pivot + 3 gates) · diffuse (elements under gate + sc-* pivot). Breaking: replaces 9 legacy skills (setup, from-reference, from-brief, wireframe, component, audit, diagnose, refactor, export-wordpress).

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Production éditoriale à partir d'un brief — documentation (specification, technical-document, user-guide) et craft narratif (toc, write, tone-finder, persona, review, storyboard, upgrade). L'assemblage des intrants (brief, lore, données) est délégué à obsidian. Fusion de doc-writer + rpg-writer.

plugins.name: game-writer
plugins.description: Écriture de contenu narratif pour le jeu vidéo (8-MINE) : bank d'assets, timelines Dialogic (dialogic-draft, dialogic-review). Pendant technique : sc-godot. (ex-gamedesign)

plugins.name: sc-godot
plugins.description: Godot/GDScript ecosystem (squelette) : sniff, audit, improve, legacy, teach — partie technique du jeu vidéo, pendant de game-writer. Skills à porter (template sc-*).

plugins.name: sc-php
plugins.description: PHP ecosystem skills: sniff, audit, improve, legacy, teach. WordPress/Laravel/Symfony perf pivots, HTMX hybrid, Eloquent + Doctrine data pivots. design-bridge: réceptacle pivot design (linter PHP/WP natif + block pattern WP).

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JavaScript ecosystem: sniff (Nuxt/Vue/SvelteKit/Alpine/Vite/Astro), audit, improve (8 capability pivots), legacy (Vue 2→3/ESM/TS), teach + SvelteKit/Svelte stores/Biome pivots + Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM/Mongoose/GraphQL/tRPC data pivots. design-bridge: réceptacle pivot design (règle ESLint + composant Vue 3/React).

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase coding + Firebase/Supabase/DynamoDB/Hasura data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, improve, legacy, teach. Perf pivots: Django, DRF, Celery, FastAPI, httpx, Flask (gap). Data pivots: Django ORM, SQLAlchemy, HuggingFace datasets. Capability pivots: Python idioms, spaCy NLP.

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, Axum/Actix-web perf pivots + SQLx/Diesel data pivots.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Personal Obsidian notes management — Pro project lifecycle, email triage (mail), solo TTRPG tooling on autonomous local game domains (pc, rpg, solo-mc), the Documents/ organiser (tree), and brief/lore/data assembly for writing: brief (portable _brief/), forge (concept), research (data), lore-extract, rules-keeper, extract-pdf.
